query:
-- S0256 (Woodlands Enterprises): voice-only customer, no data/internet plans
UPDATE services
SET discoveryNotes = CONCAT(COALESCE(discoveryNotes, ''), ' | [REVIEW FLAG 2026-03-30] Customer is voice-only — no data or internet plans associated with SmileTel. This Telstra Business Bundle Data Plan ($90/mo) needs investigation: verify if this service belongs to this customer or should be reassigned/removed.')
WHERE externalId = 'S0256';

-- SYY3IJW (Doctors At Kawana, DocAtKawaOut): sell price confirmed correct, ChannelHaus cost to investigate
UPDATE services
SET discoveryNotes = CONCAT(COALESCE(discoveryNotes, ''), ' | [REVIEW FLAG 2026-03-30] Sell price $36 confirmed correct. ChannelHaus wholesale cost $73.22 requires investigation — may include usage charges or incorrect cost allocation. Request itemised invoice from ChannelHaus.')
WHERE externalId = 'SYY3IJW';

-- SSZ2TRXE (Emergency Medicine Foundation): sell price confirmed, ChannelHaus cost to investigate
UPDATE services
SET discoveryNotes = CONCAT(COALESCE(discoveryNotes, ''), ' | [REVIEW FLAG 2026-03-30] Sell price $25 confirmed correct. ChannelHaus wholesale cost $50.43 requires investigation — no services with $50 cost found; only UCXcel Essential ($22) billed. Request itemised invoice from ChannelHaus.')
WHERE externalId = 'SSZ2TRXE';

-- S5ZNGFT (Aspley Firstcare Doctors, FirstCDocAdmin): sell price confirmed, ChannelHaus cost to investigate
UPDATE services
SET discoveryNotes = CONCAT(COALESCE(discoveryNotes, ''), ' | [REVIEW FLAG 2026-03-30] Sell price $27 confirmed correct. ChannelHaus wholesale cost $37.40 requires investigation — ChannelHaus SIP Inbound $27 ex GST expected. Request itemised invoice from ChannelHaus.')
WHERE externalId = 'S5ZNGFT';

-- S0944 (Dolani Pty Ltd): confirmed legitimate low-usage service
UPDATE services
SET discoveryNotes = CONCAT(COALESCE(discoveryNotes, ''), ' | [REVIEWED 2026-03-30] Confirmed legitimate customer service — mango.01@pbx.smileit.com.au is a real customer extension with very low Regional call usage. Negative margin is due to minimal usage revenue ($0.03) vs base cost ($0.04). Acceptable.')
WHERE externalId = 'S0944';

-- SSS03Z6Q (Travellers Group): MC-SmileTel Executive User License — sell price confirmed, wholesale cost to investigate
UPDATE services
SET discoveryNotes = CONCAT(COALESCE(discoveryNotes, ''), ' | [REVIEW FLAG 2026-03-30] MC-SmileTel Executive User License: sell price $15/user confirmed correct. Wholesale cost $39.33 requires investigation — this is a migrated customer from legacy phone platform to SasBoss. Verify actual wholesale cost for this legacy migration service.')
WHERE externalId = 'SSS03Z6Q';

-- SB3PFMC (Logan Central Family Clinic): revenue correct, wholesale cost to investigate
UPDATE services
SET discoveryNotes = CONCAT(COALESCE(discoveryNotes, ''), ' | [REVIEW FLAG 2026-03-30] Revenue $129 confirmed correct (3 Channels Business SIP $43/ch). Wholesale cost $140 requires investigation — may include an extra channel or incorrect allocation. Verify with ChannelHaus.')
WHERE externalId = 'SB3PFMC';

-- SAP1G3A (Havilah Medical Centre Doreen): revenue correct, wholesale cost to investigate
UPDATE services
SET discoveryNotes = CONCAT(COALESCE(discoveryNotes, ''), ' | [REVIEW FLAG 2026-03-30] Revenue $27 confirmed correct (3 Channels Business SIP Inbound). Wholesale cost $29.21 requires investigation — $2.21 gap. Verify with ChannelHaus.')
WHERE externalId = 'SAP1G3A';

-- STBVXCV (Mother Duck Bellbowrie): revenue correct, wholesale cost to investigate
UPDATE services
SET discoveryNotes = CONCAT(COALESCE(discoveryNotes, ''), ' | [REVIEW FLAG 2026-03-30] Revenue $75 confirmed correct (UCXcel Lite 5x$10 + UCXcel Professional 1x$25). Wholesale cost $76.25 requires investigation — $1.25 gap, likely rounding or minor charge. Verify with SasBoss.')
WHERE externalId = 'STBVXCV';
